title: Afterstage Hush
lore: Recorded backstage after the encore — lightsticks still glowing, choreography finally off, just the metronome breathing slow.
artistPersona: Four-member girl-group producers — every comeback is a choreography receipt, every chorus demands synchronized head turns and mirror-selfie energy.
albumConcept: BlackSync's peak-hour comeback — choreography so tight the timeline glitches, girl-crush energy at party volume.
